Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Harden auth, fix verification tolerances, and eliminate magic numbers

- Remove password lowercasing in hashPassword/verifyPassword \(preserves entropy\)
- Replace hardcoded password hashes in seed endpoint with dynamic hashing from env vars
- Fix withinTolerance zero-expected check to use TOLERANCE constant instead of $1
- Move DEFAULT_OCCUPANCY_RAMP_MONTHS to shared constants, use ?? instead of || in both engines
- Wrap deleteUser in database transaction for atomicity
- Fix NOI margin description to match actual 5-60% bounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Harden session security, protect system accounts, and secure image endpoints

- Add requireAuth + rate limiting \(5/min\) to /api/generate-image \(was unauthenticated\)
- Add rate limiting \(5/min\) to /api/generate-property-image
- Increase login lockout from 1 minute to 15 minutes
- Change session cookie sameSite from "lax" to "strict"
- Reduce session duration from 30 days to 7 days
- Block admin/checker from changing their email via profile endpoint
- Hide internal error messages in production for 500-level errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add database constraints: CASCADE deletes, CHECK bounds, unique indexes

- Add ON DELETE CASCADE to all 13 foreign keys \(users, properties, conversations\)
- Add CHECK constraints on global_assumptions \(projectionYears 1-30, rates 0-1\)
- Add CHECK constraints on properties \(roomCount > 0, ADR > 0, occupancy/rates 0-1\)
- Add UNIQUE constraint on scenarios\(userId, name\) to prevent duplicates
- Add UNIQUE constraint on prospective_properties\(userId, externalId, source\)
- Add index on messages\(conversationId\) for query performance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace hardcoded values with named constants in engine and seed

- Replace hardcoded occupancyRampMonths: 6 with DEFAULT_OCCUPANCY_RAMP_MONTHS in seed

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Unify dual cash flow derivation paths into single shared aggregator

Extract aggregateCashFlowByYear\(\) into client/src/lib/cashFlowAggregator.ts
as the single source of truth for yearly cash flow data. All consumers
\(on-screen statements, CSV, PDF, Excel, PPTX exports\) now aggregate from
the engine''s monthly calculations instead of independently re-deriving
debt, depreciation, and tax — eliminating divergent numbers across outputs.

- Create cashFlowAggregator.ts with shared aggregation function
- Remove 77-line local copy from YearlyCashFlowStatement.tsx
- Remove 75-line buildCashFlowData\(\) duplicate from excelExport.ts
- Replace PropertyDetail cashFlowDataMemo to use engine-aggregation path
- Delete calculatePropertyYearlyCashFlows\(\) and getPropertyIRRCashFlows\(\)
  from loanCalculations.ts \(114 lines, zero remaining consumers\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace Dashboard manual IRR cash flow helpers with shared aggregator

Dashboard.tsx and its InvestmentAnalysis sub-component each maintained
~170 lines of manual cash flow construction helpers that duplicated
logic already in cashFlowAggregator.ts. This created divergence risk:
- No zero-cap-rate guard on exit values \(could produce Infinity/NaN\)
- Fragile month-by-month refinance detection vs aggregator yearly sums
- Missing salesCommissionRate in InvestmentAnalysis fallback chain

Replace both copies with precomputed allPropertyYearlyCF memo that
calls aggregateCashFlowByYear\(\) once per property. All IRR vectors,
exit values, operating cash flows, and consolidated yearly details
now read from the aggregator. Net reduction: ~213 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Extract shared yearly aggregator to eliminate 6-way duplication

Dashboard, PropertyDetail, YearlyIncomeStatement, YearlyCashFlowStatement,
and excelExport each independently sliced MonthlyFinancials[] into yearly
chunks and reduced 25-34 fields. Any engine field change required updating
all 6 locations, and naming inconsistencies had crept in \(expenseOther vs
expenseOtherCosts, totalRevenue vs revenueTotal\).

Create yearlyAggregator.ts with aggregatePropertyByYear\(\) as the single
source of truth for monthly-to-yearly property financial aggregation.
All 6 consumers now import from this shared utility. Net reduction:
~300 lines of duplicated reduce logic across 5 files.

- New: client/src/lib/yearlyAggregator.ts \(YearlyPropertyFinancials + aggregatePropertyByYear\)
- excelExport: delete 97-line local interface + function, thin wrapper adds fiscal year label
- YearlyIncomeStatement: delete 70-line local interface + function
- YearlyCashFlowStatement: delete 64-line local interface + function, fix field names
- PropertyDetail: replace 30-line getYearlyDetails\(\) with useMemo
- Dashboard: replace 68-line yearlyConsolidatedCache + 20-line getPropertyYearly\(\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

EOF
\)")

Bash(psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS company_service_templates \(
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  default_rate REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  service_model TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'centralized',
  service_markup REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.20,
  is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  sort_order INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW\(\) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT service_template_rate_range CHECK \(default_rate >= 0 AND default_rate <= 1\),
  CONSTRAINT service_template_markup_range CHECK \(service_markup >= 0 AND service_markup <= 1\),
  CONSTRAINT service_template_model_check CHECK \(service_model IN \('centralized', 'direct'\)\)
\);
" 2>&1)

Bash(SESSION="e05b7f3b1d40765710096c6f7dbbe1af5ad8df6a787617a8132daaac18e8a518"

echo "=== 1. Signed URL \(widget connection test\) ==="
curl -sf "http://localhost:5000/api/marcela/signed-url" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" 

echo -e "\\n\\n=== 2. Agent config from ElevenLabs ==="
curl -sf "http://localhost:5000/api/admin/convai/agent" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Agent name:', d.get\('name'\)\)
print\('Agent ID:', d.get\('agent_id'\)\)
cfg = d.get\('conversation_config', {}\)
agent = cfg.get\('agent', {}\)
prompt = agent.get\('prompt', {}\)
print\('LLM model:', prompt.get\('llm', {}\).get\('model'\) if isinstance\(prompt.get\('llm'\), dict\) else 'N/A'\)
tools = prompt.get\('tools', []\) if isinstance\(prompt, dict\) else []
print\('Tools registered:', len\(tools\)\)
for t in tools:
    print\(' -', t.get\('name'\), '\('+t.get\('type'\)+'\)'\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Raw response above")

Bash(SESSION="e05b7f3b1d40765710096c6f7dbbe1af5ad8df6a787617a8132daaac18e8a518"

echo "=== 3. Tools status \(expected vs registered\) ==="
curl -sf "http://localhost:5000/api/admin/convai/tools-status" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
tools = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
registered = [t for t in tools if t['registered']]
missing = [t for t in tools if not t['registered']]
print\(f'Registered: {len\(registered\)}/{len\(tools\)}'\)
print\('MISSING:'\)
for t in missing:
    print\(f'  - {t[\\"name\\"]} \({t[\\"type\\"]}\)'\)
print\('OK:'\)
for t in registered:
    print\(f'  + {t[\\"name\\"]} \({t[\\"type\\"]}\)'\)
"

echo -e "\\n=== 4. Start conversation test ==="
curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/conversations" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"title":"Test"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Conversation ID:', d.get\('id'\)\)")

Bash(SESSION="e05b7f3b1d40765710096c6f7dbbe1af5ad8df6a787617a8132daaac18e8a518"

echo "=== Tools status after push ==="
curl -sf "http://localhost:5000/api/admin/convai/tools-status" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
tools = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
registered = [t for t in tools if t['registered']]
missing = [t for t in tools if not t['registered']]
print\(f'Registered: {len\(registered\)}/{len\(tools\)}'\)
if missing:
    print\('Still missing:', [t[\\"name\\"] for t in missing]\)
else:
    print\('All tools registered!'\)
"

echo ""
echo "=== Test a text message ==="
CONV_ID=1
curl -sf -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/conversations/${CONV_ID}/messages" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -d '{"content":"Hello, how many properties are in the portfolio?"}' \\
  --no-buffer 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"content":"[^"]*"' | head -5)

Bash(SESSION="e05b7f3b1d40765710096c6f7dbbe1af5ad8df6a787617a8132daaac18e8a518"

curl -sf "http://localhost:5000/api/admin/convai/agent" \\
  -H "Cookie: session_id=${SESSION}" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
tools = d.get\('conversation_config',{}\).get\('agent',{}\).get\('prompt',{}\).get\('tools',[]\)
print\(f'Total tools in agent: {len\(tools\)}'\)
for t in tools:
    print\(f'  name={t.get\(\\"name\\"\)} type={t.get\(\\"type\\"\)} keys={list\(t.keys\(\)\)}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s https://ui.elevenlabs.io/r/audio-player.json | python3 << 'EOF'
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for f in data.get\('files', []\):
    content = f['content']
    idx = content.find\('exampleTracks'\)
    if idx != -1:
        print\(content[idx:idx+800]\)
        break
EOF)

Bash(AGENT_ID="agent_6401kk0capntfansmn84f58yfrd9"
curl -s "https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/convai/agents/${AGENT_ID}" \\
  -H "xi-api-key: $ELEVENLABS_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)

# Widget config
widget = data.get\('widget', data.get\('platform_settings', {}\).get\('widget', {}\)\)
print\('=== WIDGET CONFIG ==='\)
print\(json.dumps\(widget, indent=2\)\)

# Check for platform_settings
ps = data.get\('platform_settings', {}\)
print\('\\n=== PLATFORM SETTINGS \(top-level keys\) ==='\)
for k in ps:
    if k != 'overrides':
        print\(f'  {k}: {json.dumps\(ps[k], indent=2\)[:200]}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'  overrides: {json.dumps\(ps[k], indent=2\)[:400]}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(AGENT_ID="agent_6401kk0capntfansmn84f58yfrd9"
curl -s "https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/convai/agents/${AGENT_ID}" \\
  -H "xi-api-key: $ELEVENLABS_API_KEY" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Print all top-level keys
print\('Top-level keys:', list\(data.keys\(\)\)\)
# Print platform_settings if it exists
ps = data.get\('platform_settings', {}\)
print\('\\nplatform_settings keys:', list\(ps.keys\(\)\)\)
# Print widget from platform_settings
w = ps.get\('widget', {}\)
print\('\\nWidget config:'\)
print\(json.dumps\(w, indent=2\)\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(git add vitest.config.ts .claude/claude.md .claude/skills/proof-system/SKILL.md .claude/skills/testing/SKILL.md && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Exclude e2e tests from default suite — zero skipped tests

E2E tests require a live server \(E2E=1 flag\) and were showing as 20
skipped in every normal run. Added exclude: ["tests/e2e/**"] to
vitest.config.ts so they only run when explicitly invoked.

Tests: 2,800 passed, 0 skipped. Health ALL CLEAR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(echo "=== Multiple locations for common filenames ===" && \\
for name in admin.ts auth.ts constants.ts helpers.ts index.ts routes.ts types.ts utils.ts; do
  echo "$name locations:" && find ./client/src ./server ./shared ./calc ./analytics ./statements ./domain ./engine -type f -name "$name" 2>/dev/null
done)
